title: fragariastrum biflorum
intro: Fragariastrum biflorum, also known as the Biflorate Strawberry, is a plant species in the family Compositae, which is a type of flowering plant. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Fragariastrum biflorum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting digestive health, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Fragariastrum biflorum can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or ointment, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
